productDisplayName: Hanes Men Pack of 2 White 100% Cotton Sleeveless Vests
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Style NoteRevel in the luxurious comfort of a combed cotton fabric in this vest from hanes. Engineered with ComfortFit technology, this vest will contour your body perfectly, stretch to your ease and retain its shape wash after wash.  And what's even better is that this vest comes with a printed brand label on the inner neck - so bid goodbye to those scratchy labels and welcome comfort at its best!Product Details White sleeveless vest made of ComfortFit 100% combed cotton knit fabric, round neck, binding at neck and armhole, printed inner branding, pack of two Materials and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Cool iron if needed Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
